spec.name: w4a32c8_q4_0_fp32_int8_qwen3_1_5b_att_qkv_n7168_k2048.json
spec.description: Qwen3-1.5B Attention QKV projection with W4A32C8. Projects input hidden states to Query, Key, Value matrices (3 * 2560 = 7680) using llama.cpp Q4_0×Q8_1 pattern.

N.description: Output features (3 * hidden_size = 3 * 2560 for Q, K, V)

K.description: Input features (hidden_size, must be multiple of 32)

block_size.description: Quantization block size for Q4_0 and Q8_1

activation.description: FP32 activation tensor (input hidden states), dynamically quantized to Q8_1 style per-block (32 values) for compute

weight.description: Q4_0 quantized weight tensor for QKV projection. Storage: (K/32) * 18 bytes per row

output.description: FP32 output tensor (Q, K, V concatenated)

block_q4_0.description: Q4_0 block quantization format for weights (32 values per block)

fields.name: scale
fields.description: Scale factor for the block (fp16, 2 bytes)

fields.name: qs
fields.description: Quantized values (32 uint4 values packed into 16 bytes, +8 offset encoding)

block_q8_1_activation.description: Q8_1-style block quantization format for activations (32 values per block, dynamically computed)
block_q8_1_activation.note: Sum field used for Q4_0 offset compensation

formula.computation: C = A @ W^T where A(M,2048) is FP32, W(7168,2048) is Q4_0 quantized, using llama.cpp Q4_0×Q8_1 pattern
formula.dequantization: Weight: w = (qs - 8) * scale_w, Activation: a = qs * scale_a
formula.compute_flow: 1. Per-block quantize A to Q8_1 style (scale_a, sum), 2. GEMM with Q4_0 weights, 3. Apply offset compensation: output = d4_0 * (d8_1 * sumi - 8 * s8_1)

performance_notes.quantized_compute: Quantized compute provides memory and compute efficiency
performance_notes.llama_cpp_compatibility: Matches llama.cpp vec_dot_q4_0_q8_1 pattern for maximum compatibility
performance_notes.per_block_quantization: Per-block (32 values) activation quantization provides better accuracy than per-row
performance_notes.qkv_projection: This is a fused QKV projection (3x2560 = 7680 output features)
performance_notes.compact_model: Qwen3-1.5B uses efficient architecture with 2560 hidden size
performance_notes.gqa_optimization: Uses GQA with 8 KV heads (4:1 ratio) for memory efficiency
performance_notes.long_context: Qwen3 supports up to 40960 context length
performance_notes.memory_efficiency: Q4_0 weights use 50% less memory than Q8_0
